name: Jamaican Jerk Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves (about 1 pound)
2 medium red onions, cut into 1/2-inch slices
2 medium bell peppers, each cut into 1/8ths
6 cups bite-size pieces mixed salad greens
1/3 cup fat-free Caesar or Italian dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat grill to gas or electric.
2. Mix dried thyme, crushed red pepper, salt, and ground allspice in a shallow dish.
3. Rub the seasoning mixture onto the chicken pieces using the back of a spoon.
4. Grill the chicken 5 to 6 inches from medium heat for 15 to 20 minutes, turning once, until juices are no longer pink at the centers of the thickest pieces.
5. After 5 minutes, add onions and bell peppers, turning occasionally until they are crisp-tender.
6. Cut the chicken into half-inch strips.
7. Toss salad greens and dressing in a bowl.
8. Gently toss the salad mixture with grilled vegetables and papaya.
9. Serve the salad mixture with chicken. Makes 4 servings.
